heading: Deployment outside of jurisdiction
label: 1978 Deployment outside of jurisdiction
notes: CodificationSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2005, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2005.

Amendments2010—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “prior notification to the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate, and” for “prior notification to”.Pub. L. 111–145
amendments: Amendments2010—Subsec. (a)(1). substituted “prior notification to the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate, and” for “prior notification to”.Pub. L. 111–145

children.heading: Requirements for prior notice and approval
children.label: a Requirements for prior notice and approval

children.text: the Chief provides prior notification to the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives, the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate, and the Committees on Appropriations of the House of Representatives and Senate of the costs anticipated to be incurred with respect to the deployment; and
the Capitol Police Board gives prior approval to the deployment.
Responding to an imminent threat or emergency.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to fiscal year 2005 and each succeeding fiscal year.
